zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice VI de CRAON於大約1296年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮朋吉素爾-阿福時，他的父親Amaury III de CRAON19歲，母親Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE17歲。他於1324年1月8日之前與Marguerite de Mello在法國皮卡迪索姆皮朋吉素爾-阿福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年8月8日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年35歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice VI de CRAON于大约1296年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮朋吉素爾-阿福时，他的父亲Amaury III de CRAON19岁，母亲Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE17岁。他于1324年1月8日之前与Marguerite de Mello在法国皮卡迪索姆皮朋吉素爾-阿福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年8月8日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年35岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CRAON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice VI de CRAON was born about 1296, in Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Amaury III de CRAON, was 19 and his mother, Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE, was 17. He married Marguerite de Mello before 8 January 1324, in Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 8 August 1330, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 35, and was buried in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice VI de CRAON est né environ 1296, à Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Amaury III de CRAON, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Mello avant 8 janvier 1324, à Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 août 1330, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice VI de CRAON um 1296 in Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amaury III de CRAON 19 und seine Mutter Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE 17. Er hat vor 8. Januar 1324 in Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Marguerite de Mello geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. August 1330 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice VI de CRAON è nato il circa 1296 nel Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Amaury III de CRAON, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Mello prima del 8 gennaio 1324, nel Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 agosto 1330, nel Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice VI de CRAONが約1296年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピエレプオント-スル-アvアで生まれた時，父Amaury III de CRAONは19歳，母Isabelle de SAINTE-MAUREは17歳であった。1324年1月8日以前にフランスピカーディソンメピエレプオント-スル-アvアでMarguerite de Melloと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年8月8日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで35歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurice VI de CRAON(이)가 대략 1296년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 피레폰트-수-아브르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amaury III de CRAON(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1324년 1월 8일 이전 프랑스 피카디 솜 피레폰트-수-아브르에서 Marguerite de Mello(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 8월 8일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice VI de CRAON nasceu aproximadamente 1296, em Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Amaury III de CRAON, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Mello antes 8 de janeiro de 1324, em Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1330, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice VI de CRAON родился около 1296 г. в местности пьиррепонт-сур-авр, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Amaury III de CRAON было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Mello перед 8 январь 1324 г. в местности пьиррепонт-сур-авр, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 августа 1330 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurice VI de CRAON nació aproximadamente 1296, en Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Amaury III de CRAON, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Isabelle de SAINTE-MAURE, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Mello antes de 8 de enero de 1324, en Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1330, en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
